description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular, fenced lot featuring a spacious green lawn, mature trees, and a backyard swimming pool. The main structure is composed of clean, geometric lines with large windows and a flat roof, complemented by a detached outbuilding or garage at the rear. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs and trees, and the property is bordered by a low wall or fence. The house has multiple entry points, including a prominent main entrance and sliding glass doors opening to the backyard. The backyard area includes a patio adjacent to the pool, ideal for outdoor living and entertaining. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a backyard pool, set in a landscaped lot with trees and a detached outbuilding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped front yard, and several large trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and detached outbuilding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, sliding glass doors, and the pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the lawn, pool, and outbuilding, as well as the rear fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
